title: The Queen Has Risen!
overview: Aoi tries to come to terms with his new position as Queen of the Galaxy. Meanwhile a new threat is on the horizon that could lead to the destruction of the entire universe!

title: The Make-Believe Fog
overview: Kafuko wants Aoi to take her on a date in the mountains. As they journey through the woods, a thick sinister fog develops.

title: Mutsuki's Heart
overview: Mito and her crew race back to Earth to help Aoi against Hikari. Meanwhile, Aoi sneaks off by herself to find out what’s really going on.

title: Tears and Flower Petals
overview: Mutsuki is struggling with her role as Aoi’s bodyguard. Will Mito and the others allow her to resign her post?

title: The Galactic War Begins
overview: Hikari kidnaps Mutsuki and uses her to taunt Aoi. In order to rescue Mutsuki, Aoi reluctantly goes to war with Hikari.

title: Suffering and Joy
overview: When Aoi refuses to give Hikari the Dainagon, Hakari resorts to her trump card - Mutsuki’s life!

title: Love and War
overview: Kafuko and the others continue to stage guerrilla warfare on the occupying army. Meanwhile Ranban tells Aoi of the legend of the First Queen.

title: The Lonely Queen
overview: Ranban is training Aoi, but is he pushing Aoi a little too hard? Meanwhile, Mito and the others continue their search for the Mirror.

title: Looming Distress
overview: Ranban continues to search for a way to escape Hikari’s shield. When an opening is finally discovered, is it really just another of Hikari’s traps?

title: Everyone With Mito!
overview: Mito launches an all out assault against Hikari’s fortress, but Aoi believes there has to be a better way. When Ranban reveals another way, will Aoi have the courage to try it?

title: The Last Promise
overview: Hikari attempts to change Aoi back into a male. Meanwhile Mito and Ranban finally learn the reason why the townspeople are being forced to blow the conches.

title: Fallen Destiny
overview: The day of the wedding has arrived, but will Hikari keep her promise? And even if she doesn’t, what choice does Aoi have?

title: A Final Goodbye
overview: Hikari and Aoi continue their battle in other dimensions. Meanwhile, the battle between Hikari’s forces and Aoi’s forces rages on back on Earth.
